name: claude-monitor
title: Claude Monitor
description: Monitor Claude Code instances, costs, network, and Ghostty terminals
author: master

commands.name: live
commands.title: Claude Live Status
commands.subtitle: Running Claude instances
commands.description: Show all running Claude Code processes with CPU/RAM

commands.subtitle: Recent sessions & subagents

commands.name: network
commands.title: Network Monitor
commands.subtitle: SSH tunnels & services
commands.description: View SSH tunnels, listening services, and external connections

commands.name: menubar
commands.title: Claude Menubar

commands.description: Show Claude Code status in the menubar
